proposals.title: Add reflection preflight checks
proposals.description: Run a preflight step that validates filesystem and command execution access before analysis; fail fast with actionable diagnostics.
proposals.expected_impact: Prevents silent analysis gaps and ensures daily review runs are dependable.

proposals.title: Persist compact daily snapshot artifact
proposals.description: Write a single end-of-day snapshot JSON (trades, active positions, PnL, sector context, key events) that can be parsed without multiple file reads.
proposals.expected_impact: Improves robustness of reflection workflows and reduces dependency on directory traversal.

proposals.title: Add no-data risk protocol
proposals.description: When review data is unavailable, automatically reduce new risk-taking (smaller size or no new entries) until observability is restored.
proposals.expected_impact: Limits exposure during periods of degraded monitoring and decision support.
